import sys

MOD = 998244353

def main():
    N, M = map(int, sys.stdin.read().split())
    result = 0
    for i in range(60):
        bit = 1 << i
        if M & bit:
            cnt = (N + 1) // (bit << 1) * bit
            cnt += max(0, (N + 1) % (bit << 1) - bit)
            result += cnt
    print(result % MOD)

main()
